column3: ['The CAA officer logs in to the system as a user with caa officer privileges. ', 'The CAA officer navigates to the page where they can raise an observation. ', 'The CAA officer enters the details of the observation, including its potential for future non-compliance or opportunity for safety improvement. ', 'The entity approval holder receives a notification about the raised observation. ']
column4: ['The CAA officer is able to access the system and view their account information. ', 'The CAA officer finds and selects the option to raise an observation within the system. ', 'The entered observation is saved in the system with all relevant information. ', 'The entity approval holder sees and acknowledges the received notification within their account on the system. ']
